products.name: Sunglasses
products.description: Add a modern touch to your outfits with these sleek aviator sunglasses.

details.material: Metal frame with polycarbonate UV400 lenses
details.care: Wipe lenses with a microfiber cloth. Store in a case when not in use.
details.fit: Unisex. Aviator style fits most face shapes including oval, square, and heart.
details.uv_protection: UV400 — blocks 100% of UVA and UVB rays
details.notes: Lightweight at 28g. Includes a soft pouch.

products.name: Tank Top
products.description: Perfectly cropped cotton tank, with a scooped neckline.

details.sizing: Available XS–XL. Runs true to size. Cropped length hits above the waist.
details.care: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low. Do not bleach.
details.fit: Relaxed crop fit. Scooped neckline. Sleeveless.
details.notes: Pairs well with high-waist jeans, skirts, or shorts.

products.name: Watch
products.description: This gold-tone stainless steel watch will work with most of your outfits.

details.material: Gold-tone stainless steel case and bracelet. Mineral crystal glass.
details.care: Wipe with a soft dry cloth. Keep away from strong magnets and chemicals.
details.notes: Dress watch suitable for office, events, and casual wear.

products.name: Loafers
products.description: A neat addition to your summer wardrobe.

details.sizing: Available US 5–13. Runs half a size small — size up if between sizes.
details.care: Wipe clean with a damp cloth. Use a leather conditioner on the upper.
details.fit: Slip-on. Pointed toe. Low stacked heel (1.5cm).
details.notes: Lightweight and breathable. Great for warm weather and smart-casual outfits.

products.name: Hairdryer
products.description: This lightweight hairdryer has 3 heat and speed settings. It's perfect for travel.

details.settings: 3 heat settings (Cool, Warm, Hot) + 2 speed settings
details.care: Clean the air intake filter monthly. Do not use near water.
details.notes: Dual voltage — works worldwide. Foldable handle for easy packing.

products.name: Candle Holder
products.description: This small but intricate candle holder is an excellent gift.

details.candle_type: Fits standard taper candles (2.2cm diameter) or tea lights
details.care: Hand wash only. Do not place in dishwasher.
details.notes: Heat-resistant glass. Arrives in gift-ready box. Great as a housewarming or birthday gift.

products.name: Salt & Pepper Shakers
products.description: Add some flavor to your kitchen.

details.care: Hand wash recommended. Dishwasher safe on top rack.
details.includes: Set of 2 (one salt, one pepper). Includes 'S' and 'P' engraving.

products.name: Bamboo Glass Jar
products.description: This bamboo glass jar can hold 57 oz (1.7 l) and is perfect for any kitchen.

details.material: Borosilicate glass body, natural bamboo lid
details.care: Glass is dishwasher safe. Hand wash bamboo lid only.
details.notes: Airtight bamboo lid keeps contents fresh. BPA-free. Good for pasta, grains, snacks, or coffee.

products.name: Mug
products.description: A simple mug with a mustard interior.

colors: White exterior with mustard yellow interior
details.notes: Thick walls keep drinks warm longer. Lead-free glaze. Great for coffee, tea, or hot chocolate.

products.name: Vintage Record Player
products.description: A stunning wooden record player with built-in minimalist speakers.

details.features: Built-in Bluetooth, Vinyl to MP3 encoding
details.care: Dust gently with a microfiber cloth.

products.name: Mechanical Keyboard
products.description: A sleek modern mechanical keyboard featuring pastel keycaps and tactile switches.

details.care: Use keycap puller to clean underneath keys.

products.name: Artisan Coffee Beans
products.description: Premium roasted coffee beans in a sleek matte black bag for the perfect morning brew.

details.care: Store in a cool, dark place.
